_readme: Machine-readable brand kit for The Ark Church. AI agents: start here for all structured brand data (colors, fonts, logos, voice). For writing rules, read ark-communications-style-guide.md. For name and ministry terminology, read ark-terminology.md. Humans: see ark-brand-review.html or thearkchurch.com/brand.

meta.source: The Ark Church Brand 2025 (PDF) and Ark Communications Style Guide (revised June 2024)

brand.name: The Ark Church
brand.mission: We exist to help people live for God, grow stronger, and make a difference.
taglines: Friendlier than any bar in town

primary.name: Blue
primary.usage: Primary brand color. Headlines, buttons, dominant backgrounds.

secondary.name: Light Blue
secondary.usage: Secondary color. Pairs with Blue for gradients, accents, and secondary surfaces.

accent.name: Yellow
accent.usage: High-energy accent. Calls to action, highlights. Use sparingly.

neutral.name: Tan
neutral.usage: Neutral background, cream surfaces, light text on dark backgrounds.

primary.name: Gotham Ultra
primary.usage: Headlines and display text. Often set in all caps for display (note: all caps is a design treatment only — body copy never uses all caps).
primary.license_note: Licensed font (Hoefler&Co). Not distributed in this repo.

secondary.name: Gotham Medium
secondary.license_note: Licensed font (Hoefler&Co). Not distributed in this repo.

tertiary.name: Richmond Regular
tertiary.license_note: Licensed font. Not distributed in this repo.

typography.fallbacks: When Gotham is unavailable (web/system contexts), use Montserrat or a heavy geometric sans-serif for display and a clean sans-serif for body.

boat_logo.description: The ark boat icon on its own (no circle).

smile_logo.description: Primary wordmark: 'THE ARK CHURCH' arched text (the 'smile') with the circle boat icon.

circle_logo.description: Boat icon knocked out of a solid circle. Converted from vector source; recolor from vector as needed.

vector_sources.description: Original EPS vector artwork plus converted SVG/PNG versions (300dpi). Use EPS/SVG for print and design work.
vector_sources.note: Each EPS also has a matching .svg and .png conversion with hyphens instead of spaces in the filename. The 'Friendlier'/'Tumbler' files are merch print artwork. The full 2022 Illustrator brand source (.ai, 80 MB) is kept offline by IT, not in this repo.

arrows.description: Two-tone curved arrow element. Filename is {ArrowColor}{BackgroundAccentColor}.

topo.description: Topographic line pattern for backgrounds and texture.

voice.summary: Authentic, informal, sincere, positive, and fun. Written for unchurched people — church jargon is explained or cut. We communicate what we want FOR people, not FROM them, and we say less to communicate more.
principles: Advocate for the audience — make people's lives easier
Avoid insider lingo — explain or avoid church jargon
Don't sell — inform, cast vision, share real outcomes
Lead with what we want for people, not from them
words_to_avoid: insider lingo and abbreviations in external communications
voice.emoji_note: Only the approved list may be used in external communications. Internal communications may use additional emojis at the sender's discretion.

dos: Use the exact ministry names: Ark Groups, Ark Care, Ark Kids, Ark Teams, Worship Ministry, Production Department, Biblical Life Coaching
Format dates as Tuesday, April 28 (day of week included, no ordinal suffix)
Use Oxford commas: games, food, and prizes
Capitalize pronouns referring to God: He, Him, His, You, Your
Capitalize Bible, Scripture, God's Word; lowercase biblical, scriptural, godly
Keep Blue and Light Blue dominant (roughly 35% each); Yellow as accent (20%); Tan and Black sparingly (5% each)
donts: Don't write 'the ark church' in lowercase
Don't use Life Groups, Life Care, Music Ministry, Praise Team, Tech Department, or Biblical Counseling — see ark-terminology.md for correct names
Don't use all caps in copy
Don't use 12:00pm or 12:00am — use noon or midnight
Don't use ordinal suffixes on dates (28, not 28th)
Don't use unapproved emojis in external communications
Don't abbreviate books of the Bible (Galatians, not Gal.)
Don't stretch, recolor outside the palette, or alter the logos
